category_sources: Official Papis documentation says Papis is a command-line based document and bibliography manager.
source_facts.description says "Powerful command-line document and bibliography manager".
display_name_sources: Official documentation heading is "Papis: Command-line Bibliography Manager".
docs_sources: Official docs page points stable users to the latest released documentation and includes getting started, commands, user guides, and developer docs.
source_facts.homepage is the official Read the Docs documentation URL.
repo_sources: GitHub repository is titled papis/papis and describes a powerful, extensible CLI document and bibliography manager.
Official Read the Docs source and project identity align with the papis GitHub organization repository.
tags_sources: Official docs list BibTeX, citations, Zotero importing, and command documentation.
Official docs say Papis searches libraries for books and papers, adds documents and notes, and imports/exports formats.
